title: lithodora cyrenaica
intro: Lithodora cyrenaica, also known as the Greek forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Lithodora cyrenaica is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
